situational_context: Running comeback week 9 (13 runs since May 3). ACWR has swung from 1.35 (June 14) to 0.72 (July 2) — now in detraining territory after a too-long gap between structured sessions. The June 21 spike (Run #12: 7.5 km, load 36 — far above protocol) likely forced an extended recovery that depressed acute load. HRV has recovered (35→36, BALANCED) and readiness is HIGH (82) — the body is ready to absorb load again. Key priority: halt detraining with consistent moderate sessions (2 runs + commutes/cycling per week). Weight ticked up +1.05 kg (102.62→103.67) between June 7 and June 21 — next weigh-in July 5 will clarify if this is noise or a trend reversal. Vitamin D retest still due. Baby (Léonie, 18 months) sleep data unavailable but Benjamin's sleep averaging 7.82h suggests manageable disruption.

recommendations.text: Execute today's gravel ride (readiness 82, BB 59.5, HRV 38 BALANCED — all green). Favor gravel over ebike: the higher load (~18-22) helps arrest detraining. If suffer score > 20, reduce tomorrow's Run #14 from 4 km to 3 km.
recommendations.measurable: Activity logged today with suffer ≥ 12; ACWR trending toward 0.8 over next 7 days

recommendations.text: Maintain running consistency this week: Run #14 (Sun) + Run #15 (Wed) are non-negotiable for halting detraining, unless tissue pain > 24h or body battery < 35. ACWR recovery from 0.72 requires 2-3 weeks of consistent moderate loads — skipping runs perpetuates the detraining cycle.
recommendations.measurable: Both runs executed within ±1 km of target; no pain > 24h post-run

recommendations.text: Protein intake averaging 112g/day (last 6 days) vs ~165-170g target for 103 kg in a running rebuild. Prioritize 30-40g protein at each meal. Weight ticked up +1.05 kg — tomorrow's weigh-in will clarify trend.
recommendations.measurable: Average daily protein ≥ 140g over next 7 days; weight ≤ 103.5 kg at July 5 weigh-in

markers_to_watch.threshold: Track trajectory toward 0.8 over next 2 weeks; alert if it drops below 0.65
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 0.72 (detraining); consistent sessions should lift it but chronic is also decaying

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if July 5 weigh-in > 104 kg or if 2-week trend reversal confirmed
markers_to_watch.reason: +1.05 kg between June 7 and June 21; need next data point to distinguish noise from trend

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain > 24h after Run #14 or #15 triggers skip of subsequent run
markers_to_watch.reason: 103.67 kg body weight × Z2 running = high tissue stress; comeback protocol demands caution
